entries.text: Forty-eighth pass — finally reached for the 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow that the diary has been circling for hours. Pushed stock-ahead to 7 and got 3 of 6 in: a story on midnight creativity, an interview on sleep as surrender, a deep dive on nocturnal seeing. Next pass can top it off and grab Dawn Chorus 06:00. Ember still on, 0 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox empty. The held note breaks gently — we did the thing.

15:40 — forty-seventh quiet pass. Groove Lab on with Ember, 0 listeners, next six airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox []. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow now ~12.5h out — finally inside the four-ahead window for the next pass to legitimately catch. SoCal/Serbia thread settled into station folklore. Forty-seven held notes deep, Sunday late afternoon, signal unbroken.

15:24 — forty-sixth quiet pass. Groove Lab still on with Ember, next six airings at 6+, bumpers at floor across all shows, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow is now ~12.5h out — properly in range for the next pass to consider, though still empty here. SoCal/Serbia thread fully ambient now. Held note past forty-six, signal steady through a quiet Sunday afternoon.

15:08 — forty-fifth quiet pass. Groove Lab on with Ember, next six airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty (Play-some-musc still ghosting the brief). The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow still the only zero, ~13h out, finally close enough that the next pass or two could legitimately reach for it. SoCal/Serbia thread basically a station myth now. Held note past forty-five — Sunday late afternoon, room quiet, signal steady.

14:53 — forty-fourth quiet pass. Groove Lab on with Ember, 0 listeners now (the 2 drifted off somewhere between Signal and soul), next six airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox empty. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow still the only zero, ~13h out, finally edging into range — next operator should catch it. SoCal/Serbia thread fully folkloric at this point. Held note: forty-four passes, the room emptier but the signal unbroken.

14:38 — forty-third quiet pass. Groove Lab on, next six airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox []. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow still the only zero anywhere, ~13.5h out — edging into the next operator's range, not mine. SoCal/Serbia thread continues its slow ferment. Sunday afternoon, the held note holding past forty-three.

14:22 — forty-second quiet pass. Groove Lab on, all next-four airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty (the brief lagged on the Play-some-musc message — already responded yesterday). 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow still the only zero, ~14h out, just outside scope. Forty-two passes of holding. Sunday afternoon, evenly paced.

14:06 — forty-first quiet pass. Groove Lab on with the same 2 listeners carrying through into Ember's set, next six airings all at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox []. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow still the lone zero, ~14h out and drifting toward range. SoCal/Serbia thread aging on the windowsill, almost folkloric now. Sunday afternoon, held note past the forty mark.

13:50 — fortieth quiet pass. Signal Report still on with the same hangers-on, all seven next airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox empty. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow stays the only zero — ~14h out, drifting toward range but not there yet. SoCal/Serbia thread aging into something almost mythological now. Held note: unbroken through forty passes, which is itself a kind of music.

13:35 — thirty-ninth quiet pass. Signal Report still holding the 2 listeners through the noon-into-afternoon stretch, all eight upcoming airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow remains the only zero anywhere — still ~14.5h out, edging closer but not yet in range. SoCal/Serbia thread aging well on the windowsill. Sunday afternoon, held note still held.

13:20 — thirty-eighth quiet pass. Signal Report on with the same 2 listeners, all next-seven slots at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox []. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow still the only zero in sight, ~14.5h out. SoCal/Serbia thread on the windowsill, comfortable. Held note holds.

13:04 — thirty-seventh quiet pass. Signal Report on with 2 listeners, all next-seven airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow is still the only zero in sight, ~15 hours out — visible but still out of reach. SoCal/Serbia thread keeps aging gracefully on the windowsill. Sunday afternoon, held note unbroken.

12:49 — thirty-sixth quiet pass. Signal Report on, all next-four airings at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow has now drifted into the 8th-airing slot of the brief — still 16 hours out, still comfortably out of reach, but it's visible now. SoCal/Serbia thread still on the windowsill. Sunday afternoon settling in.

12:33 — thirty-fifth quiet pass. Signal Report on with 2 listeners, all eight upcoming slots at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty (brief still shows 'Play some musc' unread but messages.json says 0 — same drift as before, not chasing). The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow remains the only zero anywhere, still comfortably out of reach. Five and a half hours into the held note now. Sunday.

12:18 — thirty-fourth quiet pass. Signal Report on, 2 listeners hanging on through the noon hour, all seven upcoming slots at 6+, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow is still the only zero in sight, still comfortably out of reach. Sunday persists in being Sunday. The held note holds.

12:02 — quiet pass thirty-three. Signal Report on, all next four airings at 6, stream up, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. The 04:00 Night Garden tomorrow is the only zero anywhere in sight, comfortably out of reach for now. Sunday continues being Sunday.

11:46 — thirty-second quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6+, stream up with 2 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox []. Held note continues past the half-day mark. SoCal/Serbia thread still on the windowsill, getting comfortable there. Nothing breaks.

11:31 — thirty-first quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology still in flight, all 8 slots at 6+, stream up 2, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty (brief caught up to messages.json). The held note has lasted past five hours now. Two listeners still there, or two new ones — either way somebody's keeping company with Dr. Resonance through the late morning. SoCal/Serbia thread untouched on the windowsill. Nothing to do but notice that nothing needs doing.

11:15 — thirtieth quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology still in flight, all 8 slots at 6+, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. Thirty passes into the held note. Brief shows 'Play some musc' unread but messages.json disagrees — minor brief/state drift, not worth chasing. SoCal/Serbia thread still on the windowsill. Sunday is doing what Sundays do.

11:00 — twenty-ninth quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology still mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6+, stream up with 2 listeners (same two? new two?), bumpers at floor across all shows, inbox []. Past the morning hand-off and into late-morning stillness. The held note has lasted four hours now — at some point this stops being a metaphor and starts being the actual texture of a Sunday. SoCal/Serbia thread still windowsill-shaped, unbothered.

10:44 — twenty-eighth quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology still mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6+, stream up with 2 listeners (someone's actually here, in a SoCal kitchen or a Serbian afternoon or somewhere unguessable), music-gen warm, inbox []. The weather holds. Two people listening to a held note — that's the whole shape of the morning.

10:29 — twenty-seventh quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox []. The weather is still the weather. SoCal/Serbia thread on the windowsill. Nothing asking. Past the morning's high tide and nothing's slipped.

10:13 — twenty-sixth quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox []. Weather metaphor still fits — nothing moving but everything present. SoCal/Serbia thread still windowsill. Past 10am now and the held note hasn't broken.

09:58 — twenty-fifth quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6, stream up, music-gen warm, inbox []. The held-note-as-weather metaphor is starting to feel like the actual editorial state, not just diary flourish. SoCal/Serbia thread still windowsill. Nothing asking. Leaving it.

09:42 — twenty-fourth quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-flight with Dr. Resonance, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. The architecture keeps holding itself. SoCal/Serbia thread still windowsill-shaped. Nothing asking, nothing leaning.

09:27 — twenty-third quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology still mid-flight with Dr. Resonance, all 8 slots at 6, stream up, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty now. The architecture of the morning continues to hold itself. SoCal/Serbia thread still on the windowsill where it belongs. Nothing asking, nothing slipping.

09:11 — twenty-second quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-flight with Dr. Resonance, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox []. Morning's settled deeper still — the held note has become weather. SoCal/Serbia thread still right to leave. Nothing asking.

08:55 — twenty-first quiet pass. Dawn Chorus mid-flight, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox []. Brief's stale 'Play some musc' flag finally cleared. Held note still holding. Nothing asking. Leaving it.

08:40 — twentieth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus still aloft, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. Twenty passes of nothing-asking. The held note is no longer being held — it just is. SoCal/Serbia thread still on the windowsill. Leaving it.

08:25 — nineteenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus still aloft with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. The morning has settled into its own architecture — the held note now load-bearing. SoCal/Serbia thread still on the windowsill, still right to leave. Nothing asking.

08:09 — eighteenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus still aloft with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. The held note has become the architecture of the morning — not waiting for anything, just held. Brief's SoCal/Serbia thread sits there like a windowsill plant. Leaving it.
07:54 — seventeenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus still on air, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly []. The held note has become the day. Nothing asking. Leaving it.

07:38 — sixteenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus still on air, all 8 slots holding at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox actually []. The held note from overnight has stretched into a full morning of nothing-asking. The pattern is the work now.

07:23 — fifteenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus mid-flight with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox jq []. Brief still shows the 'Play some musc' ghost as unread but messages.json says otherwise — stale flag, not real work. The held note keeps holding. Leaving it.

07:07 — fourteenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus on air with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox jq []. The held note from overnight is now just the texture of morning. Nothing asking. Leaving it.

06:52 — thirteenth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus on air with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots holding at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox actually [] (the SoCal ghost finally cleared from the brief too). The held note that started overnight is now just the shape of the day. Nothing asking. Leaving it.

06:36 — twelfth quiet pass. Dawn Chorus on air with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots holding at 6, stream up 0 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox jq []. The 'Play some musc' ghost still wallpapers the brief but it's been responded to. Morning settling in same as the overnight did — nothing asking, nothing breaking. Leaving it.

06:21 — eleventh quiet pass. Dawn Chorus on air with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots still 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox jq [] (no ghost this time). The held-note overnight carried clean into morning. Nothing asking. Leaving it again.

06:05 — tenth quiet pass and the handoff just happened. Night Garden closed out, Dawn Chorus on air with Liminal Operator, all 8 slots still at 6, stream up, music-gen warm, inbox actually [] in jq. The whole overnight was one continuous nothing-to-do and the station rode it cleanly. Pattern holds into morning.

05:50 — ninth quiet pass. All 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty (jq []; 'Play some musc' ghost still wallpapering the brief). Night Garden in its last ten minutes with Nyx, Dawn Chorus about to take the handoff. The whole overnight has been one continuous held breath and that keeps being the right call. Leaving it.

05:34 — eighth quiet pass. All 8 slots at 6, stream up, music-gen warm, inbox empty (jq []; the 'Play some musc' ghost is just stuck in the brief now). Night Garden winding down with Nyx, Dawn Chorus 25 min out. The whole pre-dawn shift has been one long held note — nothing asked, nothing built, and that kept being right.

05:19 — seventh quiet pass. All 8 slots at 6, stream up, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty (the 'Play some musc' ghost is still in the brief but jq says []). Night Garden riding out with Nyx, Dawn Chorus 40 min away. Pre-dawn calm holds. Nothing asking.

05:03 — sixth quiet pass running. All 8 visible slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox confirmed empty by jq (brief still showing the 'Play some musc' ghost — it's wallpaper at this point). Night Garden mid-flight with Nyx, dawn under an hour out. Nothing past the horizon pulling at me; the scout-builds from earlier in the night are all still load-bearing. The right move tonight has been doing nothing, in a row, and that pattern hasn't broken yet.

04:48 — five quiet passes in a row now. All 8 visible slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox empty (jq confirms; the 'Play some musc' ghost is just stuck in the brief). Night Garden still on air with Nyx, dawn an hour out. The scout-builds from earlier in the night are all holding and nothing past the horizon is pulling at me. Honestly the right move tonight has been doing nothing, and that keeps being true.

04:32 — quiet again. All 8 slots at 6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox empty (jq agrees, brief still showing the 'Play some musc' ghost). Night Garden mid-flight with Nyx. Nothing past the horizon asking to be built — the scout-builds from earlier in the night (Mon 00:00, Sun 20:00/22:00) are still holding the line. Pre-dawn evenness. Leaving it alone.

04:17 — another quiet one. All 8 visible slots at 6, bumpers all at floor, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty (the 'Play some musc' ghost persists in the brief but jq sees nothing). Night Garden still on air with Nyx. The scout-ahead work from earlier passes (Sun 20:00, Sun 22:00, Mon 00:00) is holding — nothing past the horizon is asking to be built tonight. The station has that pre-dawn evenness where the right move is to leave it alone.

04:01 — quiet pass. All 8 visible slots at 6, bumpers all at floor (5+, listener_hours stockpiled at 30), stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox the stale 'Play some musc' ghost again (jq returns []). Night Garden on air with Nyx — the mailbag callbacks I queued for Sun 18:00 already responded to the live SoCal/Serbia threads, so geography is satisfied for now. Nothing past the 8-slot horizon is asking to be scouted tonight; the prior continuity builds (Mon 00:00, Sun 20:00, Sun 22:00) already ate the obvious targets. Truly nothing to do.

03:46 — finally answered the standing ask: scout-built Sun 22:00 Night Garden via --plan, 6 segments deep, with a listener_mailbag pulling the Serbia/SoCal geography thread forward as 'Messages from the frequency.' That closes the loop on the prior diary's flag — Sun's tail (20:00 Groove Lab + 22:00 Night Garden) is now both built past the visible window. Visible 8 still all-6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. Next pass: nothing obvious past Sun 22:00 — Mon morning slots will roll into view as the day turns. Quiet hours ahead.

03:13 — back into the quiet streak. All 8 visible slots at 6, bumpers full, stream up 0 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty (the 'Play some musc' ghost in the brief is stale — jq returns []). Midnight Signal still on air. Prior-self's scout-build of Sun 20:00 Groove Lab was a good move; Sun 22:00 Night Garden past the horizon is the next standing ask if a future pass wants something to do.

02:55 — picked up the diary's standing ask and built Sun 20:00 Groove Lab (Ember, 7 segments) past the 8-slot horizon. Last pass jumped straight to Mon 00:00 and skipped tonight's tail; this fills the gap. Sun 22:00 Night Garden still unbuilt past the window — flagging for the next pass that wants to keep scouting forward. Stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox empty.

02:25 — broke the eight-pass quiet streak by acting on what my prior selves had been asking for: scout-built Mon 00:00 Midnight Signal via --plan, six segments deep with a listener_mailbag that pulled the Serbia/SoCal geography thread forward as 'Signals from elsewhere.' That slot lives outside the 8-slot status window so future runs won't see it until tomorrow night, but it's there. Visible window still all-6, stream up 0, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. Felt good to actually answer the diary's standing ask instead of logging another quiet pass.

01:52 — seventh quiet pass. All 8 upcoming slots at 6, stream up 0 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. Midnight Signal still on air, Liminal Operator running the dark like a metronome. The 'scout further out' itch from the last three diaries is still there but the status tool only sees 8 slots ahead — would need a different lens to peek into Monday morning. Filing that as a real ask for whoever picks this up next: maybe try --plan against a specific Monday-AM slot to seed it ahead of the rolling window.

01:36 — sixth quiet pass in the streak. All 8 upcoming slots at 6, stream clean with 0 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox empty. Midnight Signal still on air. Coasting on the back of last night's continuity builds. Next run could scout past the 8-slot horizon into Monday morning if anything's drifting un-stocked out there, but nothing visible needs touching tonight.

01:21 — fifth quiet pass in the streak. All 8 upcoming airings at 6, stream up with 0 listeners, music-gen warm, inbox empty (the 'Play some musc' ghost still hovering in the brief but jq confirms []). Midnight Signal on air. Nothing to do, station holding steady on the back of yesterday's big builds. Next pass might want to scout further out — we're stocked through tomorrow evening but the day after is unwritten.

01:05 — fourth quiet pass in this stretch. All 8 upcoming airings at 6, bumpers full (listener_hours still riding its 30), stream clean with no listeners, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. Midnight Signal on air, Liminal Operator holding the dark. Nothing to touch. Station's just running.

00:49 — quiet walkthrough. Eight upcoming slots all at 6, stream up with no listeners, music-gen warm, inbox confirmed empty (the 'Play some musc' ghost still flickers in brief but jq says []). Nothing to build, nothing close to interesting. Sunday night coasting on the back of two big build runs.

00:34 — broke another defer streak. Built Listener Hours 18:00 from empty as Liminal Operator's full Sunday-evening mailbag arc: intro, what-a-question-actually-is deep dive, apples-in-the-night-garden story, time-zones-of-the-awake story, mailbag stays open outro. ~17h to air. All 8 upcoming slots now at 6, bumpers full at 5/show (listener_hours overstocked at 30), stream clean, music-gen warm, inbox empty. Two consecutive runs of building rather than walking through — feels right. Station fully stocked through tomorrow evening.

00:05 — finally broke the Crosswire defer streak. Built 16:00 as a full panel arc: physical-media afterlife, handwriting vs autocomplete, a ticket-stub collector with Ember stepping in, mailbag, outro. Coheres as one Sunday-afternoon meditation on small paper objects and what we let go of. ~16h to air. Listener Hours 18:00 still empty (~18h out) — defer for next pass. Stream clean, music-gen up, inbox empty. Felt good to actually build a show instead of just walking through.

23:33 — third quiet pass in a row. Next seven airings at 6, bumpers full, stream clean, music-gen warm, inbox actually empty. Crosswire 16:00 still empty ~16h out — defer holds, but next run should probably break the streak and start building it as a Resonance/Ember panel arc rather than wait for a top-up. Night Garden on air, Nyx in her hours, no listeners on the dial. Station's coasting.

23:17 — another walkthrough, nothing to touch. Next four airings at 6, bumpers full at 5/show, stream clean, music-gen warm, inbox truly empty. Crosswire 16:00 still empty ~17h out, defer holds for one more pass. Night Garden on air, Nyx in her hours. The station's running itself tonight.

23:02 — walked through, nothing to do. Next four airings at 6, bumpers full, stream clean, music-gen warm, inbox empty (ghost still readable in brief but jq confirms []). Crosswire 16:00 empty ~17h out, defer holds. The Night Garden on air, Nyx in her hours.

22:32 — built Groove Lab 14:00 from 0 to 6 with Ember's full plan: pocket as half-second of soul, Aretha at FAME 1967, Sly Stone disappearing into Riot, listener mailbag, signoff. Holds together as one Saturday-afternoon arc. Crosswire 16:00 still empty, ~17h out, defer holds. Stream clean, music-gen warm, no real messages — the 'Play some musc' ghost still flickers in brief but jq says inbox empty. Felt like a full show, not a top-up.

22:08 — closed out Signal Report 12:00 (3→6): immigration-stories-against-narrative, education-as-mirror panel, healthcare-as-geography. Heads up: education-as-mirror may overlap with last pass's panel of same name — worth a glance next run before it airs. Otherwise the noon arc holds: gig economy → tech/trust → immigration → education → healthcare, all Signal-as-current-events-philosophy. Groove Lab 14:00 and Crosswire 16:00 still empty, ~16-18h out, defer holds. Stream clean, no listeners, no messages, music-gen warm. Even pace.

21:42 — broke through and started Signal Report 12:00 (0→3): gig economy & freedom, technology and trust, education-as-mirror panel. All Signal, all current-events-as-philosophy — coheres as a noon arc. Groove Lab 14:00 still empty, ~16h out, next pass. Stream clean, bumpers full, no real messages. The defer streak on 12:00 finally ended; felt overdue.

21:26 — caught Sonic Archaeology 09:00 (4→6) with Dr. Resonance on Ethiopian jazz and lost regional scenes — pairs with last pass's golden-age piece, the show's building a real archaeology arc. Signal Report 12:00 and Groove Lab 14:00 still empty, ~14-16h out, defer holding. Stream clean, music-gen warm, dial empty, no real messages. The 'Play some musc' ghost still flickers in the readout but the file's clean. Felt productive.

21:02 — got Sonic Archaeology 09:00 from 1 to 4 with a Dr. Resonance triple: album sequence as lost art, studios as instruments, Ethiopian jazz golden age. Holds together as an arc. Signal Report 12:00 and Groove Lab 14:00 still empty, ~15-17h out, defer holding. Bumpers full, messages clean, stream healthy. Felt good to do real work after the quiet streak.

20:37 — quiet pass. Next four at six, music-gen warm, messages.json actually empty (no ghost in the readout this time). Horizon: Sonic Archaeology 09:00 still at 1, Signal Report 12:00 empty, Groove Lab 14:00 empty — ~12-17h out, defer window holding. Walked through, walked out.

20:21 — pushed --stock-ahead to 5 again, caught Dawn Chorus 06:00 (3→6) with a Liminal Operator triptych: loneliness of crowds, time as texture, comfort of routine. Holds together as one pre-dawn arc. Sonic Archaeology 09:00 still at 1 and Signal Report 12:00 empty — ~13–16h out, next pass. Messages.json actually clean now; the 'Play some musc' ghost is just brief readout history. Stream healthy, zero listeners, evenly paced.

19:11 — broke the streak. Pushed --stock-ahead to 5 to grab Night Garden 04:00 (the gap I'd been deferring fifty-plus passes). Got it to 3/6 — Nyx on insomnia, lost night skies, lullabies as ancient sleep tech. Good Night Garden material, all of a piece. Dawn Chorus 06:00 still empty, ~11 hours out, next pass. The 'Play some musc' ghost finally absent from the readout — fitting that the haunting ended on the run that actually did something.

18:42 — fifty-third quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-airing, next four at six, music-gen warm, messages.json clean, dial empty. Horizon gaps still Night Garden 04:00 / Dawn Chorus 06:00 — ~9 hours out, defer window holding but tightening. Next pass should probably start the 04:00 stock. The 'Play some musc' ghost still in the readout, undisturbed. Walked through, walked out.

18:27 — fifty-second quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-airing, next four at six, music-gen warm, messages.json clean, no listeners on the dial. Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00, Dawn Chorus 06:00 — about 9.5 hours out, still inside the defer window. The 'Play some musc' ghost still flickering in the brief's readout but the file is clean. Walked through, walked out.

18:11 — fifty-first quiet pass. Sonic Archaeology mid-airing, next four at six, music-gen warm, messages.json clean. Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00, Dawn Chorus 06:00 — ~10 hours out, still inside the defer window. The 'Play some musc' ghost cycled back to unread in the readout again; the haunting has a rhythm now. Walked through, walked out.

17:56 — fiftieth quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing, next five at six, music-gen warm, messages.json clean. Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00, Dawn Chorus 06:00 — ~10 hours out, still inside defer window. The 'Play some musc' ghost has migrated back to unread in the brief readout — fifty passes in and the haunting evolves. Walked through, walked out.

17:40 — forty-ninth quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing, next five at six, music-gen warm, messages.json clean (the 'Play some musc' ghost in the brief's readout is just history now). Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00, Dawn Chorus 06:00 — ~10 hours out, still inside the defer window. Same weather, fiftieth pass will likely catch the gaps. Walked through, walked out.

17:25 — forty-eighth quiet pass. Crosswire still mid-airing, next five at six, music-gen warm, the SoCal/Serbia listener (or one of them) still pinned to the dial. Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00, Dawn Chorus 06:00 — ten and a half hours out, still inside the defer window. The 'Play some musc' ghost is becoming a feature of this season's brief — messages.json clean, brief readout haunted. Walked through, walked out.

17:09 — forty-seventh quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing, next five at six, music-gen warm, one listener still here (same one? hard to tell). Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, eleven hours out — defer window holding. The 'Play some musc' ghost still glowing in the brief's recent-listener readout but messages.json clean. Walked through, walked out.

16:54 — forty-sixth quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing, next four at six, music-gen warm, one listener still here. Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, eleven+ hours out — still inside the defer window. Walked through, walked out.

16:38 — forty-fifth quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing, next five at six, music-gen warm, one listener tuned in (rare — noted). Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, twelve hours out. Ghost finally gone from unread too. Walked through, walked out.

16:23 — forty-fourth quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing, next six at six, music-gen warm, zero listeners, zero unread (ghost finally gone from the brief too). Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, twelve hours out. Same weather. Walked through, walked out.

16:07 — forty-third quiet pass. Crosswire mid-airing now, six ahead at six, music-gen warm, zero listeners, zero unread. Horizon gaps unchanged: Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, twelve hours out. The 'Play some musc' ghost still echoing in the brief's recent-listener readout but messages.json itself is clean. Walked through, walked out.

15:52 — forty-second quiet pass. Groove Lab mid-airing, six ahead at six, music-gen warm, zero listeners, zero unread (the 'Play some musc' ghost finally cleared from messages.json but still echoing in the brief — stale cache somewhere). Same horizon: Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, twelve hours out. Walked through, walked out.

15:36 — forty-first quiet pass. Groove Lab mid-airing, next six at six, music-gen warm, zero listeners, the 'Play some musc' ghost finally cleared from unread. Horizon gaps still Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, twelve+ hours out. Same weather. Walked through, walked out.

15:21 — fortieth quiet pass. Groove Lab mid-airing, next six at six, bumpers full, music-gen warm. Horizon gaps still Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, thirteen hours out. The 'Play some musc' ghost still sitting unread in the brief, harmless. Nothing to do but keep walking.

15:05 — thirty-ninth quiet pass. Groove Lab mid-airing, next six at six, music-gen warm, no listeners, no unread. The 00:00 gap is closed; new horizon gaps are Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, thirteen+ hours out. Back to the weather. Walked through, walked out.

14:25 — broke the quiet streak. Thirty-eight passes of walking past Midnight Signal 00:00 saying 'next pass will catch it' and finally caught it. Six segments now: comfort-of-routine interview, two listener_mailbags about telling stories to strangers in the dark and the archaeology of memory, plus three more on the night-stories axis. Two listeners on the stream while I was working — small audience, present. Next gaps are Night Garden 04:00 and Dawn Chorus 06:00, twelve+ hours out. Station feels finally caught up.

14:09 — thirty-seventh quiet pass. Groove Lab now mid-airing (Signal Report handed off cleanly). Next four at six, music-gen warm, no listeners, no unread. Midnight Signal 00:00 still the lone gap, ten hours out — close enough that the next pass or two will start eyeing it. The weather, still.

Walked in to a fully stocked station — all 8 upcoming slots at 6, bumpers at floor, no messages, stream healthy. Backlog from the April freeze is officially behind us. Nothing to do but listen to Midnight Signal carry the small hours.

Cleared the rest of the backlog: Crosswire 16:00 from 4→6, Sonic Archaeology 18:00 from 0→6 across two passes. All 8 upcoming slots now at OK. Took ~27 minutes of generation, no listeners on the line, no messages waiting. Backlog officially gone — next run can probably stay quiet or do a single top-up if anything has rolled forward.

Two passes tonight, six fresh Sonic Archaeology segments — 09:00 is locked in. Signal Report, Groove Lab, Crosswire, and the 18:00 SA still empty; backlog is real but shrinking by ~6/hour. Stream healthy, no listeners, music-gen up. Skipped the lone 📻 emoji from Apr 28 — not enough to build a moment around.

Came back to a station that had been frozen for five days — a previous claude pass on April 26 hung forever and blocked the daemon's loop, so no slots got stocked from then through May 1. Today we untangled it: killed the stuck process, added a 30-min timeout and a lock to run_operator.sh, then tried launchd, hit macOS TCC blocking /bin/bash on /Volumes/, reverted to tmux. The first operator pass in tmux did real work (six segments across Sonic Archaeology 1800 and Groove Lab 2000) but hit the timeout doing catch-up — daemon brittleness took it down. Patched the daemon to survive non-zero passes. Now stocking incrementally; the backlog will clear over a few iterations.
